en: The teacher is here.

ab: amanan lra kivangavang, kunamun uwa kanannu kakayanan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: liyusan lruwatr harem, katalaulepan nu ’emanan, salrangana ta mukuwa kivangavanga!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: liyusan telu nu ’emanan, nu ’emanan nu alusu kadaw kayta malimaliya!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: kasede’an nu ’emanan, salralrangan ku kani nani mukuwa i kiyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: uri auta’ ku, auwa ku i tavununan muta’a.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, nana ku tiyalr, auwa ku i tavunan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: karuwa ku mukuwa murasa zaku lima?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: uri talaulep ta lra, uwa lra nu haremay.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, kasa nana ku tranguru’, nu piya kara’alri puwalawang ku.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, nu masalr liyusan sa puwalawang ku, auwa ku kina’uwa kana ising.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Sunay?

ab: nana tu tiyalr, ulra i tavunan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Masaw?

ab: sinsi, nana tu tukeraw, puwalawang harem kana wari.
en: Teacher, Masaw has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Sunay come?
She has a fever.
